issues.description:
Define Prometheus alerting rules for per-model health. Create two severity tiers: critical (prediction failure rate breaching threshold within a 10m window) and warning (elevated default value usage). Critical alerts route to PagerDuty; warning alerts route to Slack.

**TODO:**

* Define `critical` alert: per-model prediction error rate > threshold over 10m window
* Define `warning` alert: per-model default value usage rate > threshold over 10m window
* Set appropriate `for` duration and evaluation intervals
* Add labels for severity, team, and routing
* Test alerting rules against sample metric data
* Review thresholds with ML engineers

**Acceptance Criteria:**

* Critical alert fires within the 10m evaluation window when a single model's prediction error rate exceeds the agreed threshold
* Warning alert fires when default value usage rate exceeds the agreed threshold
* Alerts include model name and version in annotations
